ope.reason: EAR learns a stochastic ask/recommend policy, but ReDial/INSPIRED logs do not contain behavior-policy propensities for EAR actions.

conversation_results.baseline_dialogue_note: EAR adapter learns an ask-facet/recommend policy; clarify/end are not explicit EAR actions.

transparency.baseline_explanation_note: Template explanation generated for comparable transparency fields; EAR itself is not a neural explanation generator.

online_rollout.baseline_note: EAR is a learned ask-facet/recommend policy baseline adapted to movie genres/categories.
